overall.description: Third-person horror game gameplay featuring a schoolgirl in uniform exploring a dark, abandoned Japanese wooden building. The character walks through dimly lit hallways, enters a storage room with warm lighting, and approaches an ominous staircase shrouded in red mist while wielding a metal pipe.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark wooden school hallway with windows and posters

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously down the dimly lit hallway holding a metal pipe, passing windows and wall posters

entered.detail: dark wooden panel walls with weathered texture
multi-paned windows showing dark night outside
various notices and a distinctive poster with eyes
small wooden table with a potted plant near the windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit wooden hallway in an abandoned building. Windows on the left reveal darkness outside, while the right wall displays various posters and notices. The atmosphere is tense and quiet as the character proceeds forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with cardboard boxes and wooden shelves

events.description: character enters the storage room through a wooden doorway, lighting shifts to warmer tone

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the storage room doorway while maintaining a defensive posture with the pipe

entered.detail: doorway leading to the storage room with warm light emanating from within
tall wooden shelves filled with cardboard boxes
glass-fronted wooden cabinets with items inside
single hanging light bulb providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a doorway on the right side of the hallway and enters a storage room. The lighting changes from dim to a warmer, yellowish tone. Inside, wooden shelves line the walls filled with cardboard boxes and cabinets.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room interior with desk and filing cabinets

events.description: character exits the storage room back into the dark hallway

agents.ego_description: moving around the storage room examining shelves and boxes, then heading toward the exit doorway

entered.detail: wooden desk with papers and books stacked on top

segments.scene_description: Inside the storage room, the character explores the space, passing wooden shelves and cabinets. A desk with scattered papers becomes visible. The character then moves toward the doorway to exit back into the hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: hallway approaching dark staircase with ominous red mist

events.description: red mist or blood-like particles become visible floating near the staircase entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the dark staircase entrance with red mist, holding the pipe ready while looking up the stairs

entered.detail: dark entrance to a staircase with wooden frame
floating red particles or mist resembling blood drifting in the air
window showing stormy dark clouds outside
pitch black staircase ascending into darkness

segments.scene_description: Back in the dark hallway, the character approaches a staircase entrance where ominous red mist floats in the air. The windows reveal a stormy night sky outside. The character stops at the foot of the dark stairwell, creating a tense atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, abandoned wooden building that shifts from a tense hallway into a warm storage room before ending at an ominous, mist-shrouded stairwell. It begins by tracking the character through a narrow, dimly lit corridor lined with posters and dark windows, moving forward in a quiet, oppressive atmosphere. As the character reaches a doorway on the right, the scene transitions into a storage room where the lighting shifts to a warm yellowish tone, illuminating wooden shelves, cabinets, and a desk scattered with papers. The camera then follows the character as they navigate the cluttered space and exit back into the darkness of the hallway. Finally, the environment turns increasingly hostile as the character approaches a stairwell filled with floating red mist under a stormy night sky, coming to a halt at the foot of the dark descent.
